name: Midnight Acoustics
desc: As the cloud-like curtains open, spotlights blink with the beats, like the dawn shattering the dark night.

name: Wayward Strings
desc: As the concert comes to its end, the man looks dazed for a moment and then bows with gratitude to the audience.

name: Pristine Hope
desc: She told her students that when time flowed through life, it turned into musical notes, so everything had its rhythm.

name: Hopeful Ventures
desc: Full of love and hope, she got on the train to the city on a snowy afternoon and wished to shine on the big stage.

name: Perching Stars
desc: The newborn Goddess watched over the snow-covered town from the peaks, bringing it warmth and life even in winter.

name: Candied Rhythm
desc: Singing was Luluko's forte. Cheerful melodies carried her dream and love, passing on simple happiness and joy.

name: Warm Comfort
desc: It's early autumn. Sort the wardrobe and find a light but warm knit, with a faint fragrance of the detergent.

name: Mint Chocolate
desc: To celebrate the festival, Myra decided to share sweet chocolate and warm wishes with every customer.

name: Mellow Knit
desc: That night, the sound of music broke the silence. Darlene followed the sound and saw a young man playing the violin.

name: Snowfall Oath
desc: Darlene decided to be a full-time writer. They promised to meet up after the final exam for the orchestra.

name: Frosty Embrace
desc: Their embrace in the snow became the most treasured memory. Every snow from then on reminded them of that night.

name: Beyond Iridescence
desc: The traveler reached a garden after a long walk in the snow. According to the map, there should be an eternal spring.

name: Mellow Sunrise
desc: One morning, when Miu woke to her alarm for the third time, she only had ten minutes left to go to school.

name: Hillside Dwelling
desc: Life in solitude was peaceful but lonely. Roro often read poetry by the window, but today her mind kept racing.

name: Mellow Vision
desc: Starlet had plenty of experience, but she was still troubled by how often she was getting lost lately.

name: Wistful Paean
desc: The king told his daughter the armor was the best teacher at sword fighting and she'd be its student from now on.

name: Primeval Peaks
desc: Curious spirits would surround travelers who wandered into the mountain, who'd flee in fear and lose their bags.

name: Emberglow Heart
desc: The doors opened. As she entered, all fell silent. Helen's red dress flared like flame, searing into every gaze.

name: Chess Kingdom
desc: A golden palace sat at the end of the road. Its shadow stretched to Bena, inviting her to the wonders inside.

name: Fond Warmth
desc: When Reba was born, dandelions danced in the wind and warm sunlight, bringing seeds of life and a story of birth.

name: Sonorous Chant
desc: She travels in the morning sunlight. The gentle breeze and bird chirps sing the praises of her hard work.

name: Matchmaker's Fate
desc: Nightwisp was tasked by the gods to mend fates with the moonlight of hope, to heal wounds inside the heart.

name: Heart Aflame
desc: From the fire, she awakened to the eternal truth: wonder lies in rebirth, and life flows endlessly through cycles.

name: Aureate Surge
desc: In the raving sea, the golden lights surge like stars in the girl's eyes, reflecting a thousand dreams.

name: Code of Discipline
desc: At work, she handles tasks with care and discipline. Reserved yet fair, she meets reasonable requests gracefully.

name: PixiMeow
desc: Little Fish tops the new streamer chart—silver hair, cat ears, and a charm that wins hearts in moments.

name: Whimsical Fairytale
desc: Time to pack. Let me see… Wrapped grilled fish, one, two, three... Not a single packet gets left behind!

name: Blazing Colors
desc: She dreamed of wings flapping in the breeze, rainbow dresses, neon-lit tunnels, and sunset between high-rises.

name: Farland Voyage
desc: The brass compass turned anti-clockwise. The dry seaweed became wet again, giving off the salty scent of the sea.

name: Billowing Wheat
desc: A baking competition is held here every year, promoting the baking culture and inspiring new bakers.

name: Dream in Clouds
desc: In the breeze, a girl stands at the bow, immersed in this poetic scroll of scenery. It's her first long journey.

name: Brocade of Porcelain
desc: In my memory, she holds my hand, guiding me through a carefree childhood. Her embrace shields me from every storm.

name: Drifting Smoke
desc: The scholar had seen glorious palaces and silent deserts, sights that broadened his mind and stirred a heroic spirit.

name: Gilded Brushstroke
desc: Air was sweet, as if nature was responding to people's hopeful wishes. Bobo stood alone, gazing into the distance.

name: Northern Honor
desc: Agata and Bobo traded news they had gathered. Strangers to this land, they had to start from scratch.

name: Northern Honor - Triumph
desc: Fafnir polished his glass and remarked lightly, 'If you're at a loss for what comes next, why not go to Harrod?'

name: Hidden Jade
desc: In a stone pavilion, she heard of a hidden master. Through mist and mud, Moyun walked on, undeterred.

name: Sword of Eternity
desc: She fought bandits and bullies alike. All said: Yunxiao strikes fast, cutting through injustice.

name: Dynasty's Dream
desc: Each year, Moyun returned to share her stories. At sunset, master and student drank calamus wine and laughed as one.

name: Flowing Stars
desc: She adored the wilderness through her lens. At night, the stars gazed down, watching her drift into dreams.

name: Distant Winds
desc: The wind carried verses of twilight. Lant captured a single line through her lens, tucking it in her memory.

name: Chanting Wind
desc: Even as tomorrow beckoned her home, she would never forget the wilderness, nor the lingering songs in the wind.

name: Maple Reverie
desc: The plan to craft Momo's outfit couldn't wait! Nikki quickly recruited a lively Lilith girl and Iron Rose members.

name: Together with Momo
desc: Hold Momo up, Nikki!' 'His face doesn't even fit the frame!' 'So mean!' 'Smile! Three, two, one—cheese!'

name: Journey Reflection
desc: Grilled Fish Forever! Ta-da! It's me, with Nikk's new outfit! I can't wait to start this new journey, meow!

name: Childlike Dreams
desc: Rosy sees the park's toys as her friends, telling them stories and setting off on adventures together.

name: Phantom Pulse
desc: No one knew when Elena got the book. When asked where it came from, she hesitated—she didn't know.

name: Whimsical Voyage
desc: Yearning for the ocean, she dreamt of a blue butterfly soaring across the vast waters to a fertile land.

name: Country Fairytale
desc: The townsfolk say Camille is hardworking: she waters the land before dawn and only sets down her tools at sunset.

name: Bubbled Romance
desc: A stranded fish lay alone in a damp hollow, its pale pink scales gleaming like sparkling peach soda in the sun.

name: Time Memoir
desc: She lost herself in music, but virtual idol Ruither hits different—ethereal vocals woven into something truly unique.

name: Misty Sunrise
desc: The sun rises as the stars dim. In the morning mist, the streets thread into each other like an intricate fishing net.

name: Serene Creek
desc: One day, as Dalf chatted with a fish, a strange yet adorable little creature surfaced in the stream—an axolotl.

name: Moonlit Waltz
desc: A girl who adored finery, yet bound by chivalry. How could she merge the two? Milia pondered deeply.

name: Whispering Blossoms
desc: Sun climbs higher as children's laughter drifts in. The bitter medicinal scent in the room isolates Lonna from them.

name: First Impression Notes
desc: Pete was just a tiny pup when she first saw him. Now, they've grown to trust and love each other wholeheartedly.

name: Lost in Clouds
desc: The train climbs the tracks, whistling at the summit. Passengers get off, eager for the layered valley view at dusk.

name: Sincere Encounter
desc: They bond over fish. Joining the same hobby group, she first noticed him captivated by the fish in the display tank.

name: Slumbering Bones
desc: The world brims with strangeness. He reaches out, hand passing through the wall and blurred in shadow.

name: Seasonal Dew
desc: Festival nears. The village square piles with fruits. Every home brings its best harvest for the celebration.

name: Gentle Whispering
desc: A glow descends on her, auspicious clouds form steps, and thunder praises her merit. Heaven grants her ascension.

name: Tender Hopes
desc: The floral scent wakes the pink-haired girl. She picks up the note, eyes widening in gentle surprise.

name: Gentle Prayers
desc: She hopes to walk with her friends far into the future, chasing the dreams that await beyond the horizon.

name: Fading Morning Mist
desc: The next day, Lin Yao rushes over to apologize. She received a sudden invite to Prime Minister's birthday banquet.

name: Lingering Strings in Snow
desc: After the performance, she stands silent for a long while. Chains of fame finally bind her away from those years.

name: Endless Flowing River
desc: She decides to travel the world and find her passion again. Lang Shuang sees her off. Once again, they play together.

name: Words of Warmth
desc: The story in the book begins in a lush, peaceful forest, with a small cabin at its edge. It's Mimi's home.

name: Cute Bear Encounter
desc: She hears music, laughter, and soft snowfall. Opening her eyes, she sees a bustling, marvelous ice town.

name: Iridescent Grace
desc: The town's biggest event peaks with the float parade, as girls in finery join one by one.

name: Spring Day Reverie
desc: From that day on, every afternoon the bunny appears on time, quietly staying by her as she paints bright spring scenes.

name: Springtime Encounter
desc: The second egg rests on soft grass. She picks up a bunch of flowers nearby, petals brushing her fingers with sweet scent.

name: Springtime Poem
desc: Elno finds the last egg beneath her favorite tree. The bunny holds it, wearing the blue dress Elno once gave as a gift.

name: Secret Directive
desc: Code-named 'Night Owl,' the target is cunning and elusive. After days of pursuit, Morton confirms he will appear at a gala.

name: Fancy Dreamland
desc: Joy knows no limits, and vivid shows unfold. Are you audience or performer? Both deserve to be fully enjoyed!

name: Forgotten Theater
desc: Her uncle loved theater but never business. New amusements steal the crowd, and the old troupe fades.
